# @nifrajs/islets — LLM contract card

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/gen-llm-cards.ts. Do not edit by hand — run `bun run gen:cards`. -->

Fine-grained signals + declarative DOM bindings for nifra islands — interactivity in ~1 KB, no framework runtime. The client companion to @nifrajs/web-vanilla.

> A tight contract card for AI agents: the exports you actually call + the footguns. For the full
> reference see [`api-reference.md`](../../api-reference.md) (every export + signature) and
> [`llms-full.txt`](../../llms-full.txt) (the prose guides). One cheap read instead of the whole corpus.

## Key exports

- **batch** _(function)_ — `batch: <T>(fn: () => T) => T`
- **bindScope** _(function)_ — `bindScope: (root: BindableRoot, scope: IslandScope) => Array<() => void>`
- **computed** _(function)_ — `computed: <T>(fn: () => T) => () => T`
- **effect** _(function)_ — `effect: (fn: () => void) => () => void`
- **island** _(function)_ — `island: (name: string, setup: IslandSetup) => void`
- **islandState** _(function)_ — `islandState: (state: Record<string, unknown>) => string`
- **mountIslands** _(function)_ — `mountIslands: (root?: BindableRoot) => void`
- **signal** _(function)_ — `signal: <T>(initial: T) => Signal<T>`
- **BindableElement** _(interface)_ — `interface BindableElement`
- **BindableRoot** _(interface)_ — `interface BindableRoot`
- **IslandContext** _(interface)_ — `interface IslandContext`
- **IslandHost** _(interface)_ — `interface IslandHost`
- **IslandScope** _(type)_ — `type IslandScope = { readonly signals: Readonly<Record<string, Signal<unknown>>> readonly handlers: Readonly<Record<string, (event: Event) …`
- **IslandSetup** _(type)_ — `type IslandSetup = (ctx: IslandContext) => Record<string, (event: Event) => void> | undefined`

_…and 1 more — see [`api-reference.md`](../../api-reference.md#nifrajsislets) for the complete list._

## Footguns

- Signals are **fine-grained** — read them where you bind, not eagerly into locals, or you lose reactivity.
- This is the client companion to `@nifrajs/web-vanilla`; it ships interactivity in ~1 KB with no framework runtime.
